---
title: "Dissimilarité des sites"
author: "Biodiversité Québec"
format: 
  dashboard:
    logo: https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSd78N_4jb06v_3Gf0ePXy1YRwnE5D7mIoqWg&s
    nav-buttons: [github]
---

## Row {height=60%}

### {width=40%}
Explication des résultats 1

###
```{r}
plot(iris)
```

## Row 

### {width=40%}
Card pour la selection des options des rendus à droite

### {.tabset height=40%}

#### Global
```{r}
plot(cars)
```

#### Habitats
```{r}
plot(women)
```
